overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit Night City street at night, entering a modern corporate lobby, and approaching an elevator. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, dominant teal neon lighting, and futuristic architecture transitioning from outdoor urban to indoor corporate environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with reflective wet pavement

events.description: character transitions from walking to running briefly while moving along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking and briefly running along the wet neon-lit sidewalk past modern commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket walking past the camera
pedestrian walking ahead in the distance along the sidewalk

entered.detail: sleek white and glass building facade with horizontal teal neon light strips
highly reflective wet concrete surface mirroring the neon lights above
tall palm tree with textured trunk lining the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement display showing colorful graphics
futuristic light pole emitting teal neon illumination

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a wet neon-lit city sidewalk at night, passing modern buildings with teal accent lighting and palm trees. The reflective pavement mirrors the vibrant neon signs overhead as the character briefly breaks into a run, passing other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with automated glass doors and vertical lighting

events.description: transitioning from outdoor city street into indoor building lobby
shifting from bright neon outdoor lighting to dimmer artificial indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the automatic glass doors into the corporate building lobby

entered.detail: modern building entrance with large pillars and vertical neon light fixtures
automatic sliding glass doors with metallic frames
highly polished dark marble flooring with reflective surface
tall vertical neon light strips flanking the entrance doorway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a modern corporate building through automatic glass doors, transitioning from the neon-lit street to a sheltered entrance area. The lighting shifts from vibrant teal neon to softer artificial illumination as the polished marble floor replaces the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: upscale corporate lobby with seating areas and reception

events.description: slowing down while approaching and passing the seated NPCs in the lounge area

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby past leather seating areas and NPCs engaged in conversation

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket and blue hair sitting on leather couch
man in purple suit sitting on couch drinking from a glass

entered.detail: teal leather couch with quilted pattern and modern design
circular marble coffee table with items placed on top
large abstract artwork mounted on the dark wall behind the seating
light wood flooring in the seating area contrasting with the marble
large planter with green foliage next to the seating area

segments.scene_description: Inside the corporate lobby, the character walks past a lounge area with teal leather sofas and a marble coffee table. Two NPCs sit conversing on the couches—one in a brown jacket and another in a purple suit—while the character moves across the wooden flooring toward the back of the lobby.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator lobby with corporate branding and access control

events.description: pressing the elevator call button on the digital panel to summon the lift
entering the elevator as the doors open

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator, pressing the call button on the digital panel, and stepping inside the lift

entered.detail: dark metallic elevator doors with brushed finish
vertical illuminated advertisement poster for Delamain corporation
digital control panel with green interface and floor selection buttons
yellow caution sign placed on the floor near the elevator
large white rectangular planter with green plant near the elevator

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the elevator lobby where a Delamain corporate poster stands next to the lift. After pressing the call button on the digital panel, the elevator doors open and the character steps inside the metallic interior, leaving the lobby behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, rain-slicked city street into the sterile, polished interior of a corporate headquarters. It begins on a wet sidewalk under teal neon lights and palm trees, where the camera tracks the character as they break into a run past reflective pavement and pedestrians. As the character passes through automatic glass doors, the environment shifts from the neon-lit urban exterior to a sheltered entrance where polished marble replaces the damp street. The scene then expands into a corporate lobby, moving past a lounge area with teal leather sofas and conversing NPCs before transitioning from marble to wooden flooring. Finally, the camera follows the character toward the back of the lobby, passing a Delamain corporate poster before they press a digital panel and step into the metallic interior of an opening elevator.
